evals.prompt: I need to migrate my BarcodeCapture web app from SDK v7 to v8. Here's my main file: scanner-v7.ts, and my package.json: package-v7.json.
evals.expected_output: The skill detects v7 from package.json, updates the package version, replaces configure()+DataCaptureContext.create() with DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey(), and updates context variable references to DataCaptureContext.sharedInstance.

assertions.text: The license key is passed as the first argument to forLicenseKey
libraryLocation and moduleLoaders are passed as options to forLicenseKey
References to the old context variable are replaced with DataCaptureContext.sharedInstance
The migration guide links (7→8) are mentioned

evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my scanning app from Scandit Web SDK v6 to v7. My package.json uses: package-v6.json. What changes do I need to make?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains the v6→v7 migration: package rename from unscoped to scoped, libraryLocation path change from build/engine to sdc-lib, and the scan intention default change.

assertions.text: The package rename from scandit-web-datacapture-* to @scandit/web-datacapture-* is mentioned
The libraryLocation path change from build/engine to sdc-lib is mentioned
The scan intention default change to Smart is mentioned
The migration guide link (6→7) is mentioned
npm/yarn/pnpm install command with the new scoped package names is shown
